zh.lifeSummary: 當Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne於大約1094年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德布列塔尼時，他的父親Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne33歲，母親Ermengarde d'Anjou27歲。他於1113年之前與Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1148年9月17日在法國阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯布列塔尼享年55歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne于大约1094年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德布列塔尼时，他的父亲Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne33岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Anjou27岁。他于1113年之前与Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1148年9月17日在法国阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯布列塔尼享年55岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne was born about 1094, in Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, his father, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 33 and his mother, Ermengarde d'Anjou, was 27. He married Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany before 1113. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 17 September 1148, in Bretagne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Rennes, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne est né environ 1094, à Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Anjou, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany avant 1113. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1148, à Bretagne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Rennes, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne um 1094 in Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 33 und seine Mutter Ermengarde d'Anjou 27. Er hat vor 1113 Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1148 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bretagne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Rennes, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany prima del 1113. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1148, nel Bretagne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Rennes, Bretagne, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne(이)가 대략 1094년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Anjou(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1113년 이전 Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1148년 9월 17일 프랑스 아키테인 p이ee스-앳랜티크스 브레타그니에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 렌스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany antes 1113. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne родился около 1094 г. в местности бретагн, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Anjou, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany перед 1113 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1148 г. в местности бретагн, пирeнeес-атлантикуесь, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности реннесь, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne nació aproximadamente 1094, en Bretagne, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, su papá, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Anjou, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany antes de 1113. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1148, en Bretagne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Rennes, Bretagne, Francia.
